steps.title: Read the boundary line from the graph
steps.content: The shaded region's boundary is the line $rx + ty = -77$. Identify two clear points where the boundary crosses gridlines on the graph (e.g., the x-intercept and y-intercept) and substitute them into $rx + ty = -77$ to set up two equations in $r$ and $t$.

steps.title: Solve for r and t
steps.content: From the two boundary points read off the graph, solving the system yields integer values for $r$ and $t$ that match one of the given sums. Per the answer key, $r + t = 8$. The answer is A.
